title: move talk-transcriber to korczewski-only
description:
## Summary

The Talk transcription bot needs a whisper backend, and whisper only lives on korczewski-ha (PR #624). On mentolder the bot has been silently failing every transcription call since #623 merged. This PR moves it to `prod-korczewski/` exactly like whisper.

## Changes

- **Moved** `k3d/talk-transcriber.yaml` → `prod-korczewski/talk-transcriber.yaml`, with the prod-overlay values (GHCR image, `ghcr-pull-secret`, `${PROD_DOMAIN}`-templated `NC_DOMAIN`/`WEBSITE_URL`, `NC_ADMIN_PASS` + `NC_DB_*` secret refs) baked in directly. No separate patch.
- **Dropped** `prod/patch-talk-transcriber.yaml` (orphaned).
- **`k3d/kustomization.yaml`** — removed `talk-transcriber.yaml` from base resources.
- **`prod/kustomization.yaml`** — removed the `patch-talk-transcriber.yaml` reference.
- **`prod-korczewski/kustomization.yaml`** — added `talk-transcriber.yaml` as a resource.
- **Live cleanup** (out-of-band): `kubectl --context mentolder -n workspace delete deploy/talk-transcriber svc/talk-transcriber`. This PR locks in the manifest state so the next deploy doesn't recreate them.

## Test plan

- [x] `kubectl kustomize` for k3d/dev → 0 transcriber, 0 whisper
- [x] prod-mentolder → 0 transcriber, 0 whisper (152 kinds)
- [x] prod-korczewski → 2 transcriber + 2 whisper resources (Deployment + Service each, 162 kinds)
- [x] Live: `talk-transcriber` on korczewski-ha still 1/1 Running (72 min uptime, unchanged)
- [x] Live: `talk-transcriber` on mentolder gone

## Note (out of scope)

The website's transcription stack (`website/src/lib/whisper.ts` + 4 API endpoints + the `bachelorprojekt.transcriptions.whisper_model` column) is still in the shared base. On mentolder those endpoints will return errors when called. Cleaning up the website-side feature is a separate decision.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
